design_plan: RNG(seed=42) -> architecture=reuse_comparison_layout. AIDA: Attention(hero centered, video), Interest(real estate workflows), Desire(computer-use cache advantage), Action(CTA). Hero math: max-width 1120px yields 2–3 lines. Bento density: grid-auto-flow:dense verified. Label sweep: competitors mentioned. Button contrast: black/white pills.
headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow‑ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.

site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for real estate agents. Shows how Super’s personal AI agents operate real apps, handle MLS updates, calendar scheduling, and follow‑ups — and reuse a computer‑use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. Built with the same visual architecture as Super’s best comparison pages.
